hero.title: Your literary story, all in one place.
hero.subtitle: Search for books, track your progress, celebrate your goals and connect with other readers.

library.title: Your personal library, always with you.
library.subtitle: Add books with one click to your own virtual shelf, while keeping track of your reading progress.

habits.title: Turn reading into a habit.
habits.subtitle: Keep your daily streak, set your annual reading goal and review your reading statistics.

community.title: Discover what your inspirations are reading.
community.subtitle: Follow other readers, see their recent activity and find your next read.

cta.title: Start your reading story today.
